name: Praveen
tagline: Turning complex challenges into simple, scalable, and impactful solutions.
bucketQuote: a bucket full of ideas waiting to spill
skillsSubtitle: skills mean nothing until they build something real.

about.intro: Hello, I'm Praveen — a software developer passionate about building digital products.
about.highlight: I enjoy turning ideas into scalable and meaningful solutions.
about.bio: My journey into technology has always been driven by curiosity and a passion for creating. Today, I specialize in developing modern applications and digital experiences that solve real-world problems. Whether it's building mobile apps, designing intuitive user experiences, or developing scalable systems, I enjoy creating products that deliver value and make a positive impact on people's lives.

projects.title: Flaro AI Malayalam Calling Agent
projects.description: An AI-powered calling agent that can make calls in Malayalam to schedule appointments, conduct surveys, and provide customer support.

projects.title: Secure Pass (Personal Password Manager)
projects.description: A secure password manager that helps users store and manage their passwords safely and conveniently.

projects.title: Pure Vanilla Javascript Illustrator App
projects.description: A pure vanilla javascript illustrator app that can be used to create illustrations for your next project.
